method_summary: Survey and comparative analysis of generative models for inverse materials design, examining variational autoencoders, normalizing flows, autoregressive formulations, and diffusion models with multimodal learning approaches.
key_innovation: Comprehensive synthesis of closed-loop workflows and failure modes in automated materials discovery, establishing evaluation frameworks for discovery-grade validation.
title: Towards Automated Discovery: A Review of Generative Models, Multimodal Learning and Closed-Loop Workflows in Inverse Materials Design
